items: Roll Call
Welcome by the School Board President, Janet Lawson
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda
Approval of Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Recognition of International Staff
Connect Community Charter School Presentation for the 2023-2024 School Year
Discussion of the Board Meeting Calendar for the 2024-25 School Year
Approval of Consent Items
Approval of the May 22 Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and San Mateo Community College District for the 2024-26 School Years
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Catalyst Family Inc. for the 2024 Summer Session
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Air Education Inc. for the 2024 Summer Session
Approval of Title I School-Wide Program for Clifford School
Adoption of Resolution No. 11, Year-End Budget Transfers
Approval of the Prop 28 Expenditure Plan for the 2024-25 School Year
Approval of the Updated RCTA Contract Language and RCTA/RCSD Tentative Agreement
Approval of the School Plans for Student Achievement
Approval of Declaration of Need for 2024-2025
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - April 2024
Correspondence
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar
Adjourn the Meeting
